parameters.content:
## W12: Meeting Reminder Email Sender

✅ [STATUS REDACTED — configure after import]

CONFIG NODE (current live settings):
- testMode: false — processes all due reminders
- draftMode: false — sends live emails
- testRecordId: SAMPLE_RECORD_ID (ignored when testMode=false)
- testRecipientOverride: user@example.com (ignored when testMode=false)
- batchLimit: 10

To test safely in future:
  Set testMode=true + draftMode=true, republish.
  Restore testMode=false + draftMode=false before going live again.

Sender: Example User's Outlook
TO: Lead_Email__c (real Lead email in live mode)
CC: user@ and colleague@ on every send

Both 24h and 1h branches run every poll independently.
Duplicate guard: sent flag filters prevent resends.

## Query Logic (live mode)

24h branch — runs every poll:
  Meeting_Status__c = Scheduled
  X24_Hour_Reminder_Sent__c = false
  Reminder_24h_Scheduled_Time__c <= now
  Meeting_Start_Date_Time__c > now + 1h (safety guard)

1h branch — runs every poll:
  Meeting_Status__c = Scheduled
  X1_Hour_Reminder_Sent__c = false
  Reminder_1h_Scheduled_Time__c <= now
  Meeting_Start_Date_Time__c > now (safety guard)

TestMode=true: both queries use testRecordId only,
regardless of reminder timing.

## Send + Update (live mode)

DraftMode=false (current):
  Sends email via Example User Outlook
  24h → X24_Hour_Reminder_Sent__c = true + Last_Synced__c = now
  1h → X1_Hour_Reminder_Sent__c = true + Last_Synced__c = now

DraftMode=true (future testing):
  Creates draft in Example User Outlook Drafts only
  No Salesforce fields updated

Duplicate prevention:
  SOQL filters on sent flags prevent any resend.
  Once flag is true, tracker never appears in query again.
